summary: E-Sign Consent Screen and Guided Fill-In Navigation (Phase 47) - All core features tested and working correctly. ConsentScreen appears before document view with all required elements. Guided Fill-In header with Start/Next/Finish buttons works correctly with floating 'Fill In' arrow and auto-advance.

consent_screen_display.details: ConsentScreen appears as full-screen modal with 'Review and continue' heading, disclosure text, checkbox, language selector, Print button, and Continue button.

consent_checkbox_continue_button.details: Continue button is disabled (gray) when checkbox unchecked. Becomes enabled (indigo) when checkbox is checked. Clicking Continue closes modal and reveals signing UI.

consent_disclosure_toggle.details: 'Read the Electronic Record and Signature Disclosure' toggle shows/hides disclosure text paragraph correctly.

consent_session_persistence.details: Once accepted, page refresh does NOT re-show consent screen. Persisted in sessionStorage under key docflow.consent.v1.{sessionKey}.

consent_per_signer_isolation.details: Different signers on same device get separate consent screens. Tested with two different document tokens showing different recipient names.

guided_header_display.details: Sticky top bar shows required-field count badge (e.g., '5 required fields left') and Start button when there are pending fields.

guided_start_button.details: Clicking Start shows floating green 'Fill In' arrow next to first required field with pulse animation. Button changes to 'Next field' after clicking.

guided_fill_in_arrow.details: Floating arrow positioned to LEFT of active field with green background, 'Fill In' label, and triangle point. Uses data-testid='guided-fill-in-arrow'.

guided_auto_advance.details: After filling a required field (signature via Type tab), pending count decreased from 5 to 4 and Fill In arrow moved to next field automatically.

guided_finish_button_state.details: Finish button is disabled (gray) when required fields incomplete or confirm checkbox unchecked. Has correct styling classes.

sidebar_complete_signing_hidden.details: Large 'Complete Signing' button in left sidebar has 'hidden' class. Informational text shown directing user to header Finish button.

active_field_highlight.details: Active field has ring-2 emerald highlight. CSS keyframes 'pulseActiveField' defined in index.css for pulse animation.

date_auto_fill.details: Date field shows auto-filled value '04/18/2026' in MM/DD/YYYY format with green checkmark.

signature_reuse_regression.details: SignatureReusePrompt from Phase 46 still works - signature modal opens with Draw/Type/Upload tabs and 'Apply to all' checkbox.

critical_code_review_comments: ConsentScreen.js: Well-implemented with proper data-testid attributes. Uses sessionStorage with STORAGE_PREFIX='docflow.consent.v1' for persistence.
useGuidedFillIn.js: Correctly handles radio groups via GROUP_KEY_FOR, treats date as auto-filled, filters by recipientId and hiddenFieldIds.
InteractiveDocumentViewer.js: Properly renders floating 'Fill In' arrow with data-testid='guided-fill-in-arrow', handles activeFieldId for page switching and scrolling.
PublicDocumentViewEnhanced.js: Correctly integrates ConsentScreen and guided header. Complete Signing button has 'hidden' class with informational text replacement.
PackagePublicView.js and PackagePublicLinkView.js: ConsentScreen integrated at return top with proper session key generation.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test documents from iteration_3: R5azq2m5g5fvWzHKqQrN8-ZsJ7MnsuFedEHlqI2HRW8 (Test Signer NoAuth), OQWP4jCzpZb0CuYHnKUZMwDqdBHsjgAmwiYqqkA3I5M (Apply All Tester)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Consent Screen and Guided Fill-In features are fully implemented and working. Test documents from iteration_3 are still available. Template 5f8425c8-e067-4108-818e-cf76aaa30f6d has 3 signature fields, 2 initials, 1 checkbox, 2 radio, 1 text - ideal for testing guided fill-in. ConsentScreen uses sessionStorage key format: docflow.consent.v1.{token}::{email}. Guided fill-in uses useGuidedFillIn hook with pendingFieldIds, activeFieldId, and auto-advance logic.
features_tested: ConsentScreen full-screen modal with all UI elements
Continue button disabled until checkbox checked
Consent persistence in sessionStorage (no re-show on refresh)
Per-signer consent isolation (different signers get separate consent)
Guided signing header with pending count badge
Start button → floating Fill In arrow appears
Start button changes to 'Next field' after clicking
Fill In arrow positioned left of active field
Active field highlight with emerald ring and pulse animation
Finish button disabled until all fields complete + confirm checkbox
Complete Signing button hidden with informational text
